arts.ttl: How Manchester United should line up vs Crystal Palace in Premier League fixture
arts.athr: newsdesk@men-news.co.uk (Samuel Luckhurst, George Smith, Steven Railston)
arts.sum: Man Utd play Crystal Palace in the Premier League on Sunday and here is how our writers think they should start.

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news: Mo Salah handed transfer message as Reds look to anger Man Utd
arts.sum: Arne Slot's Liverpool claimed another important win on Saturday, getting the better of Bournemouth, but questions remain over their potential transfer activity in the coming days

arts.ttl: Sunday’s briefing: Forest on fire and Rashford edges closer to Man Utd exit
arts.sum: Forest responded from their 5-0 defeat at Bournemouth last week with a resounding victory over Brighton.

arts.ttl: 'Wouldn't be shocked' - Pundits disagree on Manchester United vs Crystal Palace score prediction
arts.sum: Man United will be looking to make it four wins in a row when Crystal Palace visit Old Trafford on Sunday.

arts.ttl: I was fuming at 'criminal' Manchester United decision - now I am ready to prove them wrong
arts.sum: Sunday's visit of Crystal Palace to Old Trafford will mean more than most for one former United player

arts.ttl: Why isn't Man Utd vs Crystal Palace on TV? How to watch Premier League match
arts.sum: Manchester United are set to play host to Crystal Palace on Sunday, but UK-based fans unfortunately won't be able to tune in to watch the Premier League clash unfold on live television

arts.ttl: Man Utd vs Crystal Palace: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Previewing Man Utd vs Crystal Palace in the Premier League on Sunday, including team news, predictions and how to watch on TV.

arts.ttl: Wayne Rooney in demand for next job after Man Utd legend's Plymouth axe
arts.sum: Wayne Rooney is being chased by a number of TV programmes, with Match of the Day keen snap him up, while Sky also rate him highly and this week he offered strong views on Gary Neville’s The Overlap

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: 'Talks ongoing' over double exit as 21-year-old follows Jadon Sancho path
arts.sum: Chelsea are reportedly in talks with Borussia Dortmund over a deal to send out-of-favour midfielder Carney Chukwuemeka to the Signal Iduna Park.

arts.ttl: Man United defender deal 'collapses' as Red Devils stand firm on transfer fee
arts.sum: Tyrell Malacia's proposed loan move from Manchester United to Benfica reportedly collapses due to the Portuguese side failing to meet the Red Devils' demands.
